case_title: ASDOURIAN CONSTRUCTION CO. VS SPECIALITY GLASS & MARBLE CO.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SPECIALTY GLASS AND MARBLE CO. RETURNED TO SENDER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALITY GLASS & MARBLE CO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALITY GLASS & MARBLE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASDOURIAN  CONSTRUCTION  CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECIALITY GLASS & MARBLE CO. $4,740.92 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,779.92, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
